description: Execute V0.8 Hotfix: Fix the 404 Not Found error caused by the incorrect 'npx team-agents-cowork-init' command in the documentation, and correctly expose the MCP server as a global bin command ('agent-protocol-mcp') to replace the broken 'npm run mcp' instruction.
scope: 1. Replace 'npx team-agents-cowork-init' with 'agent-protocol-init' across READMEs and installation docs. 2. Add #!/usr/bin/env node to src/mcp-server/src/index.ts and expose it as 'agent-protocol-mcp' in package.json. 3. Update the 'npm run mcp' documentation instructions to instruct users to configure 'agent-protocol-mcp' in their MCP client (e.g. Cursor).
out_of_scope: Strictly NO implementation of the Node.js DAG execution runner (V0.9). NO modifications to active workflow/dispatch.json state semantics outside of this patch progression.
stop_conditions: Attempting to modify source code in src/ or bin/ beyond dependency and hashbang management.
